tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Run the execution preflight gate to confirm smoke/manual/CI plans are adequate before starting triads.
acceptance_criteria: Execution preflight recommendation recorded (ACCEPT or REVISE)
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, specs, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Complete execution_preflight_report.md with ACCEPT/REVISE and required fixes
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: C0 slice (code)
acceptance_criteria: Meets all acceptance criteria in C0-spec.md
start_checklist: git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 slice (test)
tasks.description: Add/modify tests for C0 spec (tests only).
start_checklist: git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run the targeted tests you add/touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-test"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 slice (integration core)
tasks.description: Merge C0 code+tests and make the slice green on the primary dev platform.
acceptance_criteria: Core slice is green under make integ-checks and matches the spec
CI compile parity dispatch is recorded (run id/URL) in session_log.md
Linux behavioral smoke dispatch is recorded (run id/URL) in session_log.md
start_checklist: git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" TASK_ID="C0-integ-core"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run: cargo test -p world --tests -- --nocapture
Run: cargo test -p world-agent --test full_isolation_nonpty -- --nocapture
make integ-checks
Dispatch CI compile parity: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 (record run id/URL)

Dispatch behavioral smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="C0" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1 (record run id/URL)

If any platform smoke fails: start only failing platform-fix tasks via: make triad-task-start-platform-fixes-from-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" SLICE_ID="C0" SMOKE_RUN_ID="<run-id>"
After all failing platforms are green: start final aggregator via: make triad-task-start-integ-final FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" SLICE_ID="C0"
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-integ-core"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 slice (integration Linux)
tasks.description: Linux platform-fix integration task (may be a no-op if already green).
acceptance_criteria: linux smoke is green for this slice
start_checklist: Run on linux host if possible
git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" TASK_ID="C0-integ-linux"
end_checklist: Dispatch Linux smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" PLATFORM=linux SMOKE_SLICE_ID="C0" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1 (record run id/URL)
If needed: fix + fmt/clippy + targeted tests
Ensure smoke is green; record run id/URL
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-integ-linux"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 slice (integration final)
tasks.description: Final integration: merge any platform fixes and confirm behavioral smoke + CI parity are green.
acceptance_criteria: All required platforms are green and the slice matches the spec
C0-closeout_report.md is completed with run ids/URLs and evidence
start_checklist: git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0-spec.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" TASK_ID="C0-integ"
end_checklist: Merge platform-fix branches (if any) + resolve conflicts
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run: cargo test -p world --tests -- --nocapture
Run: cargo test -p world-agent --test full_isolation_nonpty -- --nocapture
make integ-checks
Re-run CI compile parity: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 (record run id/URL)

Re-run behavioral smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="C0" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1 (record run id/URL)
Complete slice closeout gate report: docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat/C0-closeout_report.md
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-integ"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: Feature cleanup (worktrees + branches)
tasks.description: At feature end, remove retained worktrees and prune local task branches via scripts/triad/feature_cleanup.sh.
acceptance_criteria: All worktrees removed (or intentionally retained) and cleanup summary recorded in session_log.md
start_checklist: git checkout feat/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat && git pull --ff-only
Confirm all tasks are completed and merged as intended
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" DRY_RUN=1 REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Then run: make triad-feature-cleanup FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/full-isolation-landlock-overlayfs-compat" REMOVE_WORKTREES=1 PRUNE_LOCAL=1
Set status to completed; add END entry with script summary; commit docs
